title: Edexcel Certificate International GCSE Biology Unit: KBI0/4BI0 Paper: 1B

sub_questions.ms_text: Use the information in the food web to complete the statements in the table.
What effect would a decrease in the population size of caterpillars have on the population size of blue jays?
What is meant by the term 'population'?
Name two different molecules that are found in the blood of deer that the tick could feed on.
Use the information in the diagrams and your own knowledge to give three ways in which the structure of an artery differs from the structure of a vein.
